productDisplayName: Fastrack Men Canvas Red Stitches Grey Belts
description: An all-time favourite accessory, belts form an integral part of dressing - be it to secure a bottom, or act as a styling detail to tops and trousers. This canvas belt from fastrack is set to pump up your style and add zing to your attire.Length: Freesize Made of canvas for durability and style Leather strip running along the centre of the belt with contrast thread detailing for enhanced style and life Tang clasp to offer a snug Fit and to hold the belt in place Holes to customise fit Broad base to sit snug on the waist Brand name embossed on the loop CareWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustUse a brass polisher to maintain buckle shineUse a leather conditioner to protect the leather
